signals.headline: Trump's Truth Social claims on Strait of Hormuz denied by Iran | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump's Truth Social claims on Strait of Hormuz denied by Iran | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Donald Trump posted on Truth Social claiming Iran agreed to never close the Strait of Hormuz again and hand over nuclear material, but Iran sarcastically dismissed these as false, urging him to stop posting and relax, with no confirmation of any deal.[1][4]

signals.headline: BJP releases manifesto for Kerala Assembly elections | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
BJP releases manifesto for Kerala Assembly elections | NO | MED confidence**  
The Bharatiya Janata Party unveiled its Kerala poll manifesto promising Rs 3,000 monthly pensions, 20,000 liters free water per household, welfare, and infrastructure, ahead of the April 9, 2026 elections.[1][2]
